recommendations.title: The Spanish Prisoner
recommendations.overview: An inventor of a secret process suddenly finds himself alone as both his friends and the corporation he works for turn against him.

recommendations.title: House of Games
recommendations.overview: A psychiatrist comes to the aid of a compulsive gambler and is led by a smooth-talking grifter into the shadowy but compelling world of stings, scams, and con men.

recommendations.title: Homicide
recommendations.overview: While investigating the ruthless murder of an elderly woman, a Jewish police detective unravels a bizarre conspiracy involving a Zionist organization.

recommendations.title: Phil Spector
recommendations.genres: Drama, TV Movie, Crime, History, Music
recommendations.overview: A drama centered on the relationship between Phil Spector and defense attorney Linda Kenney Baden while the music business legend was on trial for the murder of Lana Clarkson.

recommendations.title: Redbelt

recommendations.title: Spartan
recommendations.overview: U.S. government agent Scott is assigned to rescue the daughter of a high-ranking government official. As willing as he is to bend the rules to get things done, though, Scott is shocked to find that others are willing to go even further to protect a p

recommendations.title: Heist
recommendations.overview: Joe Moore has a job he loves. He's a thief. His job goes sour when he gets caught on security camera tape. His fence, Bergman, reneges on the money he's owed, and his wife may be betraying him with the fence's young lieutenant. Moore and his partner,

recommendations.title: The Trouble with Harry
recommendations.overview: The trouble with Harry is that he’s dead. In a quiet Vermont village, a corpse creates unexpected chaos as several townspeople each believe they may be to blame.

recommendations.title: Stuart: A Life Backwards
recommendations.overview: Story about the remarkable friendship between a reclusive writer and illustrator and a chaotic homeless man, whom he gets to know during a campaign to release two charity workers from prison.

recommendations.title: Billu
recommendations.overview: When a famous Bollywood actor visits a small village for a film's shoot, a poor hairdresser's claim that they were once childhood friends soon makes him the centre of attention.
